# Changelog

### ✨ Features
- Add collapsible settings sections with persistent state
- Add Config and Logs section with complete translations and log file access from notifications
- Add resizable tree view panel with keyboard navigation and advanced search modes
- Add separate code font size setting
- Add searchable dropdown component with overlay
- Add manual download option to update dialog and global progress tracking
- Add batch operations infrastructure for consolidated git refreshes
- Add tag-based history navigation

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Update auto-updater for platform-specific manifest and download URLs
- Prevent FileSystemException when running shell commands in GUI
- Resolve build warnings and update dependencies
- Update tree view when files are restored externally
- Fix UTF-8 decoding for update manifest to handle special characters
- Disable shell verbose mode to prevent Windows FileSystemException

### 🔧 Improvements
- Restructure build system from universal to platform-specific release architecture
- Replace context menus with Speed Dial FAB with improved dismissal behavior
- Implement commit diff navigation in file history panel
- Bundle 13 Google Fonts for offline use
- Enforce design system compliance across all components (BaseDialog, BaseDropdown, BaseBadge, BaseIconButton, BaseLabel)
- Standardize error handling with NotificationService
- Limit cross-repo checkout to protected branches only

# Changelog

### ✨ Features
- Add custom lint rules including `avoid_dialog`, `avoid_print`, and comprehensive design system enforcement
- Add `BaseDropdown` component for standardized dropdown behavior
- Add global progress tracking and tag-based history navigation
- Implement commit diff navigation in file history panel
- Replace context menus with Speed Dial FAB in history and diff viewer with tap-outside, ESC, and scroll dismissal
- Bundle 13 Google Fonts for offline use

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Replace all `Chip` widgets with `BaseBadge` for design system consistency
- Replace `DropdownButtonFormField` with `BaseDropdown` in merge branches dialog
- Resolve Riverpod 3.x StateNotifier compatibility and type errors
- Fix radiusXS errors and resolve analyzer warnings

### 🔧 Improvements
- Enforce design system compliance by migrating all components to Base* system (buttons, dialogs, text fields, list items)
- Standardize error handling with NotificationService across all file operations
- Replace hardcoded spacing and colors with AppTheme constants
- Move Speed Dial FAB to BrowseScreen level and improve ESC key handling
- Update custom lint rules to use DiagnosticReporter API

### 📝 Documentation
- Add comprehensive UI migration documentation (UI-CONCEPT.md, UI-MIGRATION-PLAN.md, UI-MIGRATION-STATUS.md)
- Declare 100% UI migration completion
- Add comprehensive UX documentation with automated enforcement (All 3 Tiers)
- Clean up and archive outdated documentation

# Changelog

### ✨ Features
- **Changes View**: Add draggable Speed Dial FAB with multiple actions to diff viewer
- **Changes View**: Add split view with live diff and keyboard navigation
- **Changes View**: Replace tabs with unified tree view for git changes
- **Branches**: Add protected branches support with configurable detection
- **Branches**: Add delete all unprotected branches functionality
- **Branches**: Add global branch switcher across repositories
- **Pull Requests**: Apply merge dialog UI pattern to create PR dialog and add merge button
- **History**: Add force push option after reset to commit
- **Logging**: Add comprehensive Git command logging to git.log

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- **Blame**: Fix commit details not opening for boundary commits
- **Blame**: Fix text readability and alternating row contrast in dark mode
- **Global Branch**: Optimize rebuild triggers and fix Riverpod assertion errors
- **Global Branch**: Check branch existence before checkout
- **Config**: Resolve endless repository validation loop on startup
- **Merge Dialog**: Add constraints to multi-line TextField to prevent layout errors

### 🔧 Improvements
- **Performance**: Optimize keyboard navigation and selection performance in changes view
- **Diff Viewer**: Create unified diff viewer architecture
- **Stashes**: Improve UI consistency and input field theming
- **Error Handling**: Capture all Flutter errors and log them

# Changelog

### ✨ Features
- Add checkbox multi-select for repositories with improved operation feedback
- Add ESC key handling to BaseDialog for better keyboard navigation
- Add success and dangerSecondary variants to BaseButton component

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fix race conditions and improve batch repository operations in drag-drop functionality
- Fix syntax error by removing extra closing parenthesis in git_output_dialog
- Ensure dialog title text is readable in both light and dark themes
- Suppress analyzer info warnings for BuildContext and deprecated Radio API

### 🔧 Improvements
- Migrate 17+ dialogs to new BaseDialog component for consistency
- Move batch operations to app shell and simplify UI
- Standardize repository icons and remove redundant toggles
- Move 3-dot menu to far right and remove icon to standalone button in list view
- Convert settings widget buttons to BaseButton for consistency
- Clean up analyzer warnings and info messages

- Call committerDateDisplay method with locale parameter in history
